content.en:
"If you calculate the time of the domain yuan, there are still 36.5 billion yuan of domain yuan, which is not a long time. Yinduo said with great dignity.

"It's not that long, indeed. "

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

He was ready to wait, wait for the Ultimate Ancient Sea to be born, and impact the main realm of the Ultimate Realm in the Ultimate Ancient Sea.

At this moment, Yinduo Extreme Venerable suggested, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, I suggest that the Blood Sea Ultimate System Breakthrough be the Ultimate Realm Lord. "

"Why?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

"Because there is also an existence at the peak of the Nine Realms, who has cultivated the Blood Sea Ultimate System to the point where he is about to break through to the Ultimate Realm Master, the other party should also use this Ultimate System to break through. If he breaks through, your Blood Sea Ultimate System will have no hope of breaking through to become the Ultimate Realm Master, unless you kill him. "

"Your Yuanxing Ultimate System has no competitors at present, so don't be in a hurry to break through, and first take up the quota of the Blood Sea Ultimate System. "

Yinduo Jizun said.

"In this case, it will undoubtedly offend that 15 existence at the peak of the Nine Realms, right?" Ye Tian said.

"Hahaha, what about offending, the battle for the ultimate system is like this, even between us, the ultimate realm masters, we often do this, everyone wants to snatch it, but sometimes we cultivate the same ultimate system, that is the battle of the Dao, and sometimes it is even a life-and-death struggle. "

Yinduo Jizun was worried that Ye Tian was afraid of the other party's background, so he said: "Although the other party also has a backer, but our Void Heaven Palace is not afraid, you can rest assured that you can use the Blood Sea Ultimate System Breakthrough as the Ultimate Realm Master, and then use the Yuanxing Ultimate System to break through again for the second time." In this case, if you break through to the Ultimate Realm Lord, your strength will be extremely terrifying. Of course, whether it is you or him, they will choose to break through when the Ultimate Ancient Sea is born, it depends on who will break through first! You can rest assured, even if he breaks through first, you will not fall if you fail to break through in this situation, and you will not even be injured. "

"Okay, I'll take the breakthrough of the Blood Sea Ultimate System as the Ultimate Realm Master. "

Ye Tian decided.

"Don't run away in the last few years, otherwise you won't be able to hide the consummation of your Blood Sea Ultimate System. Yinduo Jizun reminded.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian knew.

......

Time flies.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian's main energy began to focus on cultivating the Transcendent Dimensional Realm Ultimate System, which was currently the slowest to progress, and it was also the reason why he took the least amount of time.

But when he really tried his best to comprehend the ultimate rules of the transcendent realm, his efficiency gradually improved.

But I have to admit that the progress of the Extreme Dimensional Realm is too slow, and it is only the number of Ultimate Realm Masters, but in fact, the progress speed is far less than that of other Ultimate Systems.

Of course, it's also because there is no reference.

The Abyssal Star Ultimate System has the Abyss of Eternal Night, the Eternal Night Ultimate System has the Abyss of Eternal Night, the Blood Sea Ultimate System has the Constant Blood Sea, and the Transcendent Realm Ultimate System has no reference, and it is difficult to continue to ascend when it comes to comprehending the Ultimate Rule Realm.

Of course, if you find the ultimate rules that can quickly assist you in your own understanding, then it will be easier to take this path.

Unconsciously, tens of billions of domain yuan years have passed.

In such a long period of time, Ye Tian finally cultivated the ultimate system of the transcendent realm to the realm of the ninefold ultimate rules, and the ultimate body of the transcendent realm was also completed.

Now, his physical strength is extremely terrifying.

"I now have the Extreme Realm System, the Abyssal Star Ultimate System, the Blood Sea Ultimate System, and the Eternal Night Ultimate System all ascended to the Consummation Realm, as well as the Sevenfold Realm Extreme Realm Extreme System, maybe my current strength is not much different from the weaker Ultimate Realm Lord. Ye Tian said darkly.

There was still a long time before the Ultimate Ancient Sea, and he didn't want to waste this time.

He was going to take another ultimate system at the same time.

He thought about it, and was ready to cultivate a powerful ultimate system, an ordinary ultimate system, he couldn't look down on it.

......

Tianqu Forbidden Zone.

Silver light area.

The Silver Light Ultimate System is definitely very powerful, after all, the Nine Realms Peak Existence that generally comprehends the ultimate rules cannot withstand the silver light in the Silver Light Region.

It can be seen that the silver light ultimate system is absolutely extraordinary.

Therefore, he was ready to comprehend the Silver Light Ultimate System and take this path, but he didn't know if this path had achieved the Ultimate Realm Master.

He asked Yinduo Jizun, but Yinduo Jizun didn't know.

After all, when they reach the Ultimate Realm Master level, they can't see through each other's Ultimate System, and some old guys are extremely hidden, and no one knows what Ultimate System the other party has cultivated.

However, Ye Tian was still ready to give it a try.

Silver light area.

Ye Tian walked in, and with his current physical strength, the power of the silver light area could not hurt him.

It was here that he silently comprehended the power of the Silver Light Region, and thus studied his own Silver Light Ultimate System.

Gradually, the silver light ultimate system reached the ultimate realm.

Then, he began to create his own ultimate dimensional killing move of the Silver Light Ultimate System.

This step was more difficult, but Ye Tian spent a long time researching, and finally created and created an ultimate dimensional killing move called the Silver Domain, which also allowed him to successfully complete the 730 ultimate transformation of the Silver Light Ultimate System and become the ultimate master of this ultimate system.

After that, he continued to improve, and the ultimate body of silver light gradually improved.

The peculiarity of this ultimate system lies in its penetration and speed, and the damage is very powerful.

Ye Tian spent hundreds of millions of years to finally perfect this ultimate system, and

Comprehend the ultimate rules of silver light.

At this point, this ultimate system has been completely perfected.

Since then, Ye Tian has continued to comprehend the ultimate rules of silver light and improve the ultimate rules of silver light.

Double Silver Light Ultimate Rule!

Triple Silver Light Ultimate Rule!

Quadruple Silver Light Ultimate Rule!

And he also created some more ultimate dimensional killing moves, so that the power of the silver light ultimate rule was fully exerted.

In this way, more than 10 billion yuan years have passed.

And this day.

Ye Tian's Silver Light Ultimate Rule was raised to the Ninefold Realm, and the Silver Light Ultimate Body was completely complete, and his strength had also increased a bit.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian did not also cultivate the ultimate dimension killing moves, but tried to combine the two ultimate systems, so as to create a joint ultimate dimension killing move, such an ultimate dimension killing move would be even more terrifying, and it was also something that some Ultimate Realm masters tried to do.
